title: Kckrisa
compiled_truth: Kckrisa is an external contact at [Worldnet](companies/worldnet). Over the corpus period (2000-07-25 to 2001-02-08), Kckrisa sent 6 and received 12 emails, totalling 18 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (6), [Mark Castiglione](people/mark-castiglione) (2), [Scott Josey](people/scott-josey) (2), [Joan Quick](people/joan-quick) (1), [Mwhitt](people/mwhitt) (1).
